project_type: Go CDK application (AWS CDK in Go) with Lambda processor - event-driven sleep audio pipeline
build_system: go build with CDK CLI (npx cdk synth). Separate go.mod for lambda/processor/
test_framework: Go standard testing package + CDK assertions (jsii bridge). Tests in cdk-base_test.go, pipeline_test.go, lambda/processor/main_test.go
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'NODE_OPTIONS="" go test -v -count=1 ./...' for root tests. 2. Run 'go test -v -count=1 ./lambda/processor/' for Lambda tests.
snapshot_or_generated_files: testdata/snapshot.json - golden file for CDK snapshot test. Regenerate by deleting and running TestStackSnapshotStability. This task should NOT modify infrastructure so snapshot should not change.
setup_instructions: go mod download && cd lambda/processor && go mod download && cd ../..
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can download Go modules and npm packages from registries. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset/empty for CDK jsii tests. CDK tests take ~75s due to jsii bridge.
contribution_requirements: Follow Conventional Commits format. Keep ARCHITECTURE.md in sync with infra changes (this task is docs-only so no infra changes). No snapshot regeneration needed unless infrastructure changes.
key_patterns: Mermaid diagrams in ARCHITECTURE.md render in GitHub. Badges use shields.io format in README. CI workflow already generates coverage.out artifacts. The project is an experiment in AI-driven TDD with 7 meta-prompting patterns.
directory_structure: Root: CDK app (cdk-base.go, pipeline.go) + tests + docs. lambda/processor/: Go Lambda handler. .github/workflows/: CI. testdata/: snapshot golden file.
